declarations.comments:
Shift layer timing by a number of frames.

Positive values move the layer later in the timeline.
Negative values move the layer earlier.
Both startFrame and endFrame are adjusted together.
declarations.title: shiftLayerTime

declarations.comments:
LayerTransform — a newtype for layer transformations with Monoid instance.

Layer transformations form a monoid under composition:
- Identity: `identityLayer` (no change)
- Combine: `(<<<)` (right-to-left composition)

This enables composing transform pipelines algebraically:
```purescript
pipeline :: LayerTransform
pipeline = mkTransform (setOpacity 50.0) 
        <> mkTransform (setVisible true)
        <> mkTransform (set3D true)

result = runTransform pipeline layer
```
declarations.title: LayerTransform

declarations.comments: Run a LayerTransform on a layer.
declarations.title: runTransform

declarations.comments: Create a LayerTransform from a layer function.
declarations.title: mkTransform

declarations.comments:
The empty (identity) transform — applies no changes.

This is the monoid identity: `emptyTransform <> t == t == t <> emptyTransform`
declarations.title: emptyTransform

declarations.comments:
Combine two transforms into one (left-to-right application).

`combineTransforms a b` applies `a` first, then `b`.
This uses the Semigroup instance explicitly.
declarations.title: combineTransforms

declarations.comments: Identity transform — returns layer unchanged.
declarations.title: identityLayer

declarations.comments: Constant layer — ignores input, returns fixed layer.
declarations.title: constLayer

declarations.comments: Flip a two-argument layer function.
declarations.title: flipLayerFn

declarations.comments: Apply a transformation to a layer using fluent syntax.
declarations.title: applyTo

declarations.comments: Compose two layer transformations (right to left).
declarations.title: composeTransforms

declarations.comments: Compose two layer transformations (left to right).
declarations.title: pipeTransforms

declarations.comments: Apply a transformation to a layer.
declarations.title: mapLayer

declarations.comments: Lift a value into a layer context (identity).
declarations.title: pureLayer

declarations.comments: Sequence two Maybe layer operations.
declarations.title: bindLayer

declarations.comments: Apply a Maybe function to a Maybe layer.
declarations.title: applyLayerFn

declarations.comments:
Lift a layer into Maybe context.

Useful for composing with functions that may fail.
declarations.title: liftLayer

declarations.comments:
Apply a transform, returning the result with function application.

Uses explicit ($) for clarity in complex expressions.
declarations.title: transformWith

declarations.comments:
Generate a debug string for a layer with full details.

Follows the Show Debug Convention: output is structured and parseable,
includes all relevant state for debugging at billion-agent scale.

Example output:
```
(LayerDebug 
  name:"Background" 
  type:solid 
  frames:0.0-300.0 
  visible:true locked:false 3d:false
  opacity:100.0 
  blend:normal)
```
declarations.title: showLayerDebug
